_meta.description: Impulse-consistent joint-fit variant: sin-only kicks (displacement-continuous) + switch-on-compensated drive tone, excitation epoch scanned −2600..−800. Same closure/caps/scoring as the shipped joint world.

verdict: Impulse-consistent optimum: t1 = -1600, USNO 86400.0015, deltaTStart 58.07, Espenak 12.64 s, full 29.22 s; displacement-continuous everywhere (steps 6.0e-02/4.5e-03 s). GO — quality within tolerance of the shipped world; re-ship the continuous episode forms (runtime evaluators change: sin-only kicks + compensated tone).
